mainEntity.name: Can the GL.iNet Flint 3 be used for Time Machine?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Current firmware with Samba 4.18.8 can expose a USB SSD as a valid Apple Time Machine SMB target when the hidden macos and timemachine UCI options are enabled.
Yes. The settings are stored in /etc/config/samba4 through UCI and survive Samba restarts and router reboots.
GL.iNet regenerates /var/etc/smb.conf whenever Samba restarts, so direct edits are overwritten.
No. This setup uses SMB and Samba's Apple compatibility features.
